Villa Blue Ocean - one of the most stunning villas available for winter rentals, exclusively for a minimum stay of 1 to 3 months. This remarkable three-bedroom villa, part of Amy Villas' portfolio since 2015, is nestled within the Sea Cliff Village, offering a breathtaking view of the Esentepe coastline. Blue Ocean Villa, with its deep blue panorama at your feet, is a place of pure indulgence, featuring a private pool overlooking the sea.
The spacious living room of the villa is equipped with satellite TV, a DVD and CD player, as well as a radio. The seating area affords the same stunning view, allowing you to feel right at home in extremely comfortable seating arrangements. The kitchen, designed for seamless integration with the living area, comes fully equipped with an oven, fridge/freezer, dishwasher, and washing machine, along with a dining table. There is also a guest restroom on this floor.
To reach the second floor, where the bedrooms are located, ascend the marble and wide staircase. The primary bedroom of this rentable villa with a pool boasts its private bathroom, while the other two double bedrooms share a fully equipped family bathroom. All bathrooms feature air conditioning systems for cooling or heating.
Outside the villa, you'll find a private landscaped pool measuring 10 x 4 meters, along with a sun terrace furnished with loungers, chairs, and umbrellas. For added enjoyment during hot summer evenings, a special barbecue set is provided for the summer months.

Acorn Estates is excited to welcome to the market this peaceful and tranquil villa, with private garden and pool, set in a popular location close to the historic village of Tatlisu.

There is a double bedroom to the ground floor which also leads out to the garden and pool area and a WC to the ground floor.

Located only 35 minutes to both Famagusta and Kyrenia, the property is in an ideal area for those wishing to escape the hustle and bustle of the busy cities, whilst also benefitting from all local amenities and some of the best restaurants in the island only a short drive away!

If you are looking for a luxury holiday home with a seafront position and stunning open views of the sea and mountains, then look no further! This property offers not only breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea and beautiful mountains, but it also comes fully furnished.
Inside the apartment, you will find a spacious open plan lounge, kitchen, and dining area. The lounge has patio doors that open to a terrace, allowing you to enjoy the mild Cyprus climate and the scenic views of the garden and sea.
The property boasts three double bedrooms, with the master bedroom featuring an en-suite bathroom. The seafront complex is meticulously maintained and offers three large communal pools (including a children's pool), a gym, sauna, jacuzzi, and a library/games room. Additionally, a variety of bars, restaurants, and amenities are just a short drive away.
With Larnaca airport only a 60-minute drive and Kyrenia approximately 30 minutes away, this property offers the perfect opportunity for a fulfilling Mediterranean lifestyle, complete with over 320 days of sunshine! Whether you're looking for a holiday home or an ideal investment opportunity, this property could be exactly what you've been waiting for.

• 75 m² internal size
• 20 m² balcony
• 75 m² roof terrace
• Title deed in owner’s name, VAT paid
• Completed in 2007
• Fully furnished
• 3 bedrooms
• 2 bathrooms
• Fully fitted kitchen with white goods
• Bright open-plan living area
• Fly-screens and air conditioning throughout
• Terrace leading out from lounge
• Stunning sea views
• 3 communal swimming pools including children’s pool/playground
• Communal gym, sauna and jacuzzi
• Sandy cove just a couple of minutes walk
• Close to golf course, bars, restaurants, shops and beaches only a short drive away
